frames.setting: Formal government office/room with bookshelf backdrop and toy building props (representing city businesses). Mamdani and Kenny Mina (Commissioner, NYC Business Services) present together. Red, white, and blue toy/model buildings on table.

frames.presentation_style: Policy announcement video with a city commissioner. Uses toy building props as visual metaphor for small business neighborhoods. Lower-third branding for the NYC Future Fund.

frames.setting: Same formal office. Mamdani and Kenny Mina continue explaining loan terms. An infographic card appears on screen listing loan terms (Minimum Revenue $50k, Minimum Loan Size $25k, Rate 7.5%, Flexible Repayment Terms).

frames.presentation_style: Detailed policy explainer with on-screen infographic listing specific loan program terms. More data-dense than typical social video. Two-person format with commissioner adds credibility.
